name: nvm
description: Nevermind: an AI-native command palette for your desktop
author: Pablo Varela

scripts.test: pnpm -C backend exec node --import tsx --test "../src/**/*.test.ts" "../src/**/*.test.tsx" && pnpm -C backend test
scripts.verify: pnpm check && pnpm build && node --check dist/main/main.js && node --check dist/preload/preload.cjs && node scripts/run-checks.cjs && pnpm typecheck && pnpm -C backend exec node --import tsx --test "../src/**/*.test.ts" "../src/**/*.test.tsx" && pnpm -C backend check && pnpm -C backend test
scripts.dist:mac:arm64: pnpm build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --mac zip --arm64 --publish never
scripts.dist:mac:x64: pnpm build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --mac zip --x64 --publish never
scripts.dist:linux:x64: pnpm build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --linux AppImage deb --x64 --publish never
scripts.dist:linux:arm64: pnpm build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --linux AppImage deb --arm64 --publish never
scripts.dist:win:x64: pnpm build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --win nsis portable --x64 --publish never
